vocab.example: The persistent rattle of the old air conditioning unit in my office can be quite distracting during meetings.

vocab.meaning: tiếng bịch/tiếng động trầm đục (bị chặn bớt âm thanh)
vocab.example: Living in an apartment, I often hear the muffled thud of footsteps from the neighbors upstairs.
The piercing shriek of children playing in the park nearby occasionally breaks the silence of my afternoon.
I find the faint rustle of leaves in the backyard very therapeutic when I'm trying to unwind.

vocab.meaning: tiếng vo ve/rì rầm không dứt
vocab.example: The incessant buzzing of overhead power lines is a constant backdrop to life in this industrial zone.

vocab.meaning: tiếng máy móc kêu lách cách/ầm ĩ
vocab.example: The nearby construction site contributes a daily clatter of machinery that makes working from home a challenge.

vocab.meaning: tiếng ầm ì tần số thấp
vocab.example: Even with windows closed, the low-frequency rumble of the subway passing beneath the building is perceptible.

vocab.meaning: tiếng bóp còi lúc có lúc không (ngắt quãng)
vocab.example: The intermittent honking from the narrow alleyway below is a hallmark of the city's chaotic traffic.

vocab.meaning: tiếng tí tách/lộp bộp nhẹ nhàng (thường nói về mưa)
vocab.example: I love the gentle pitter-patter of rain on the rooftop; it’s the most soothing sound in my daily life.

vocab.meaning: tiếng cười nói ồn ào/khàn khàn
vocab.example: Every evening, the raucous laughter emanating from the pub next door signals the start of the nightlife.
